_comment: This PR makes recorded MP4 previews carry the game's sound. SFX are off by default in-game, so the demo recorder (tools/demo/DemoRunner.gd) now force-enables them for the recording (session-only — it never rewrites a developer's saved settings). The inline GIF is still silent (GIF can't carry audio); click the 'watch with sound' MP4 link to hear it. Uses the combat-heavy showcase battle so plenty of sounds (clashes, deaths, rout, victory) fire.
caption: Recorded MP4 previews now carry sound — the demo recorder force-enables SFX while recording (session-only, so it never changes your saved settings). The inline GIF is silent as always (GIF can't carry audio); click **watch with sound (MP4)** to hear the battle. Sim is untouched: Sfx is presentation-only with its own RNG, so replays stay deterministic.
